title: Verify existing implementation of notification system
description: The notification system described in this task is already fully implemented. Verification needed: (1) src/models/notification.ts exists with NotificationSeverity ('info'|'warning'|'error') and Notification interface, (2) src/services/notifications.ts exists with NotificationService CRUD operations and mark-as-read, (3) src/routes/notifications.ts and src/app/api/notifications/ routes exist with GET/POST/PATCH handlers, (4) src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts exists with formatNotification/filterNotifications helpers, (5) unit tests exist for all modules.
existing_patterns: src/services/notifications.ts: NotificationService class with Payload dependency injection, similar pattern to other services in src/services/
src/routes/notifications.ts: Express-style route handlers using withAuth HOC, matches pattern in src/app/api/ routes
src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts: Pure utility functions with co-located .test.ts file, follows src/utils/ pattern
src/collections/Notifications.ts: Payload collection config with access control, matches other collections in src/collections/
